Bash(powershell -File - << 'PSEOF'
$file = 'C:\\Users\\hy971\\source\\repos\\MyDietitianMobileApp\\src\\MyDietitianMobileApp.Api\\Program.cs'
$content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
$fffd = [char]0xFFFD

# Fix garbled ingredient names
$content = $content.Replace\("S$\($fffd\)t", "Süt"\)
$content = $content.Replace\("Yo$\($fffd\)urt", "Yogurt"\)
$content = $content.Replace\("Zeytinya$\($fffd\)$\($fffd\)", "Zeytinyagi"\)
$content = $content.Replace\("Kahvalt$\($fffd\)l$\($fffd\)klar", "Kahvaltiliklar"\)

Write-Host "FFFD chars after fix:" \(\($content -split [char]0xFFFD\).Count - 1\)
Write-Host "AddRangeAsync\(seedRecipes\) count:" \([regex]::Matches\($content, 'AddRangeAsync\\\(seedRecipes\\\)'\).Count\)

[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($file, $content, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
Write-Host "File written"
PSEOF)
